description: Production-harden the nlp-policy-nz pipeline and API: API versioning, environment separation (dev/staging/prod), backward compatibility testing, database migration strategy, load testing, feature flags, and observability SLAs.
oracle_notes: The current project is structured as a research prototype (alpha/beta maturity). No API versioning, no staging environment, no backward compatibility guarantees, no load testing, no rollback strategy, no database migration tooling. These are required for a mature, stable end-product.
